overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a foggy, neon-lit Night City street at night. The character navigates through urban intersections with futuristic traffic, passes holographic advertisements, and ascends an outdoor staircase between high-rise buildings.

scene_state.functional_zone: foggy urban intersection with holographic advertisement

events.description: character walks past the large green holographic billboard into the open street intersection
futuristic black car with glowing wheels drives through the intersection

agents.ego_description: character wearing a hat and coat walking steadily through the foggy street, passing a palm tree and large holographic display

notable_agents.action: futuristic sedan driving through the foggy intersection with headlights cutting through the haze

entered.detail: large glowing green holographic cube displaying a face and map data labeled 'Night City'
tall palm tree in concrete urban planter
tall building with illuminated windows fading into the foggy night sky

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a view of a massive green holographic billboard in a foggy cyberpunk city. The character walks past a palm tree and approaches a street intersection where futuristic cars drive by with glowing wheels and headlights piercing through the dense fog.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy city street with pedestrian traffic and vehicle crossings

events.description: camera tilts upward to look at the tops of skyscrapers disappearing into the fog
multiple futuristic cars drive past with bright headlights in quick succession

agents.ego_description: continuing down the sidewalk alongside the street, briefly looking up at the towering buildings overhead

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with blue hair and orange shirt walking toward the camera on the sidewalk

entered.detail: illuminated rectangular advertisement showing a face on the side of a building
tall pole with traffic signals and street signs

segments.scene_description: Walking along the city street with moderate pedestrian traffic, the camera briefly pans up to reveal skyscrapers fading into the fog. Futuristic cars with glowing elements drive past on the road, and various pedestrians walk along the sidewalks near illuminated building advertisements.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow street leading to outdoor staircase entrance between buildings

events.description: approaching the wide outdoor staircase structure leading to upper level
passing under different colored lighting near the stair entrance with blue and red hues

agents.ego_description: walking toward the outdoor staircase entrance, passing by a large vertical pink billboard and pawn shop

notable_agents.action: woman in green crop top and blue pants walking ahead toward the staircase

entered.detail: large vertical screen displaying 'THE FOURTH WALL' advertisement with vibrant purple and pink colors
wide concrete stairs with blue painted railings leading upward between tall buildings
storefront with yellow illuminated signage reading 'EL DORADO PAWN SHOP'

segments.scene_description: The street narrows as the character approaches an outdoor staircase between high-rise buildings. A prominent pink digital billboard advertises 'The Fourth Wall' while pedestrians gather near the entrance to the stairs. The El Dorado Pawn Shop is visible on the left as the character approaches the stairway.

scene_state.functional_zone: outdoor pedestrian staircase between high-rise buildings

events.description: beginning ascent of the long outdoor staircase
reaching the top of the stairs and emerging onto the upper level walkway

agents.ego_description: climbing the outdoor staircase following other pedestrians, moving from street level to the upper walkway

notable_agents.action: man in white shirt and patterned pants climbing stairs ahead of the character

entered.detail: blue painted metal railings lining both sides of the concrete stairs
elevated pedestrian platform with palm trees at the top of the stairs

segments.scene_description: The character ascends the long outdoor staircase between towering buildings, following other pedestrians upward. Blue railings line the concrete steps as the camera climbs toward the upper walkway. The scene transitions from street level to an elevated pedestrian area with different lighting and architectural elements.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a foggy, neon-lit street intersection up into an elevated pedestrian walkway between towering skyscrapers. It begins by passing a massive green holographic billboard and a palm tree, moving toward a dense intersection where futuristic cars with glowing wheels pierce through the fog. As the camera continues along the city street, it briefly pans upward to reveal skyscrapers fading into the mist before the road narrows toward a cluster of illuminated advertisements. The scene then shifts toward a pink digital billboard and the El Dorado Pawn Shop, leading the character to the base of an outdoor staircase. Finally, the camera ascends the long concrete steps alongside other pedestrians, climbing past blue railings to transition from the street level to a high-rise walkway.
